flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Santa Monica College rose 28% between 2007 and 2010 ($508 → $652).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Santa Monica College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.1k → $10.7k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Santa Monica College rose 14% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.5k → $4.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Santa Monica College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.8% → 0.0%).
